tweet.text: I’ll be here in about an hour for an AMA, responding to anything and everything. Roadmap, velocity, startups, how I like my steak. Drop your questions below.

author.name: Pedro Franceschi
author.description: Founder & CEO @BrexHQ, helping 35k+ companies (from startups to the largest companies on the planet) to spend smarter and move faster.
